opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: There's a heavy band crushing my chest, and I can't seem to draw a satisfying, deep breath.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on yesterday after a bit of activity and hasn't eased — I'm scared it's my heart or lungs.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on about 24 hours ago after some minor exertion
symptom_narrative.character: a heavy tight band across the chest, with 'air hunger' and a dry cough
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: tightness maybe 6-7/10; the breathlessness frightens me
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: across the chest, diffuse, not to one side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: fairly constant, a bit worse with a deep breath and with exertion
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: dry cough, severe fatigue, and a lot of anxiety about my heart
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had Long COVID symptoms for months but this chest tightness and breathlessness is new and worse

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: Long COVID (post-viral syndrome) for several months

family_history_as_reported.narrative: nothing major that I'm aware of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live alone and my anxiety makes the breathlessness feel worse

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes symptoms in full sentences but is frightened about his heart

objective_data_offered.value: I'm breathing a bit fast and shallow but I can talk in full sentences
my chest feels tender if I press on it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-palpation; not a clinical examination and does not exclude cardiac/PE causes
